name: Phoenix Rolls (Banh Phuong Hoang)
recipeIngredient: Jane Harris DXDG05A 2 ts Lemon grass minced (fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast into 5 thin slices.
2. Smash the shrimp in a mortar until it forms a paste, then add chopped green onions, lemon grass, salt, and pepper. Continue mashing until you have a paste.
3. Lay the chicken fillet on a flat surface. Place a piece of ham at one end, and top it with about 1/10 of the shrimp mixture.
4. Roll up the chicken roll, dip in cornstarch, and fry in oil until golden.
